# Direction-annotation snapshot covering all three annotation
# variants on the same lot (TwoWay isn't an annotation alphabet —
# the unannotated default already produces a two-way layout). 12
# vertical drive lines at 100ft pitch; every other one carries a
# different direction so each annotated aisle has a default-TwoWay
# bay between it and the next, isolating the stall-lean pattern of
# each variant.
#
# Stall angle is 45° so the lean direction is unambiguous: at 90° the
# cosine vanishes and the four variants would render identically.
#
# Drive-line ids are auto-allocated 1..12 in declaration order. We
# annotate ids 2, 4, 8 (id 6 stays unannotated — its default-TwoWay
# bay separates the OneWayReverse from the TwoWayReverse).

polygon outer
0,0
1240,0
1240,300
0,300
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

drive-line
70,-20
70,320
----
drive-line: 70,-20 -> 70,320

drive-line
170,-20
170,320
----
drive-line: 170,-20 -> 170,320

drive-line
270,-20
270,320
----
drive-line: 270,-20 -> 270,320

drive-line
370,-20
370,320
----
drive-line: 370,-20 -> 370,320

drive-line
470,-20
470,320
----
drive-line: 470,-20 -> 470,320

drive-line
570,-20
570,320
----
drive-line: 570,-20 -> 570,320

drive-line
670,-20
670,320
----
drive-line: 670,-20 -> 670,320

drive-line
770,-20
770,320
----
drive-line: 770,-20 -> 770,320

drive-line
870,-20
870,320
----
drive-line: 870,-20 -> 870,320

drive-line
970,-20
970,320
----
drive-line: 970,-20 -> 970,320

drive-line
1070,-20
1070,320
----
drive-line: 1070,-20 -> 1070,320

drive-line
1170,-20
1170,320
----
drive-line: 1170,-20 -> 1170,320

set stall_angle_deg=45
----
set stall_angle_deg=45

annotation direction on=drive-line id=2 t=0.5 traffic=one-way
----
annotation direction on=drive-line id=2 t=0.50 traffic=one-way

annotation direction on=drive-line id=4 t=0.5 traffic=one-way-reverse
----
annotation direction on=drive-line id=4 t=0.50 traffic=one-way-reverse

annotation direction on=drive-line id=8 t=0.5 traffic=two-way-reverse
----
annotation direction on=drive-line id=8 t=0.50 traffic=two-way-reverse

generate
----
total_stalls: 447

annotations
----
direction on=drive-line id=2 t=0.50 traffic=one-way
direction on=drive-line id=4 t=0.50 traffic=one-way-reverse
direction on=drive-line id=8 t=0.50 traffic=two-way-reverse

show-annotations
----
show-annotations: on

snapshot
----
